content: customers(customer_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, region TEXT, segment TEXT). Use this table for customer names, regions, and customer segments.
products(product_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, product_name TEXT, category TEXT, unit_price REAL). Use this table for product names, product categories, and prices.

orders(order_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, order_date TEXT, customer_id INTEGER, product_id INTEGER, quantity INTEGER, discount REAL). Use this table for order dates, quantities, discounts, and foreign keys.
Revenue formula: SUM(orders.quantity * products.unit_price * (1 - orders.discount)). Use ROUND(..., 2) for display.
Units sold formula: SUM(orders.quantity). Use this for questions about product volume or order quantity.
Discount amount formula: SUM(orders.quantity * products.unit_price * orders.discount).
Join orders to customers with orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id.
Join orders to products with orders.product_id = products.product_id.
Monthly grouping rule: use substr(orders.order_date, 1, 7) AS month and GROUP BY month.
